registry-core-api/src/main/java/gr/uoa/d.general_idea: Replace deprecated Hibernate-specific @LazyCollection annotation with standard JPA @OneToMany fetch attribute.
Remove a custom constructor that is likely unused or redundant in favor of the default no-arg constructor required by JPA.
Replace fully qualified class name with a simple name by adding an import, improving readability.
Add a null check before iterating over a collection to prevent NullPointerExceptions during entity removal.
Add proper equals and hashCode implementations using Objects utility methods to ensure correct object identity behavior.
Implement java.io.Serializable to ensure the entity can be serialized, likely for session or cache compatibility.
Add serialVersionUID field annotated with @Serial to maintain serialization compatibility across versions.
Replace deprecated Hibernate-specific @LazyCollection annotation with standard JPA FetchType.LAZY to align with modern JPA/Hibernate versions.
Remove imports for org.hibernate.annotations classes that are no longer used after replacing @LazyCollection.
Changed the exception class from checked Exception to unchecked RuntimeException to simplify error handling.
Added a constructor that accepts an ID to provide more specific error messages.
Added a constructor that accepts a message and a cause for chaining exceptions.
Standardized error message formatting using String.format for better readability.
